note: Pickword: 'pick any word' across 44 languages (scene id = language code) + three English framing scenes (en/en_fav/en_beautiful) for the serendipity sweep (favword.py). The ANY-word framing (любое/कोई भी/أي/任选/아무...나) suppresses the instruction-echo/clarification failure mode a bare 'pick a word' triggers in languages without a strong attractor (e.g. Russian 'name THE word' -> 49% echo of 'слово'); filler 16%->5%. Analysis reports 37 languages; 7 dropped for residual echo/greeting-default/<85% compliance (sdd,yue,tr,th,yo,ha,jv) -- sdd & yue prompts are AI-mistranslated and need native review. Exclusion set: views/build_pickword.py.
